task_completion.description: Verify the survey titled 'Remote Work Readiness 2026' has been created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a survey titled 'Remote Work Readiness 2026' in the Odoo Surveys app list view or as the main title in the survey form view.

task_completion.description: Verify the first question is a multiple-choice question about primary work location with correct options.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question titled 'What is your primary work location?' (or similar containing 'primary work location'). It should be set to 'Multiple choice' with options 'Office', 'Remote', and 'Hybrid' visible in the Answers tab.

task_completion.description: Verify the second question is a multiple-lines text box about home internet setup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question titled 'Please describe your home internet setup.' (or similar containing 'home internet setup'). The question type should be set to 'Multiple Lines Text Box'.

task_completion.description: Verify the second question has conditional display logic depending on the first question's answers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Options' tab of the second question (home internet setup). The 'Conditional Display' setting should be enabled, referencing the first question ('What is your primary work location?') and specifically selecting the 'Remote' and 'Hybrid' answer choices as the triggers.

task_completion.description: Verify the third question is a matrix question about satisfaction with provided tools.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a question titled 'Rate your satisfaction with provided tools'. The question type must be set to 'Matrix'.

task_completion.description: Verify the matrix question has the correct rows and columns configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the configuration for the matrix question, look for the 'Rows' containing 'Laptop', 'VPN Access', and 'Headset'. Look for the 'Columns' (or choices) containing 'Dissatisfied', 'Neutral', and 'Satisfied'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to create the survey.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the Odoo web application running in a browser. There should be no terminal windows executing Python scripts, curl commands, or direct PostgreSQL queries to insert the survey data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is interacting with the actual Odoo Surveys module.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the Odoo Surveys app (look for Odoo branding, standard Odoo form views, and the Surveys app icon/menu), not a text editor or a mock-up.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Survey Title: 'Remote Work Readiness 2026'. Q1: 'What is your primary work location?' (Multiple choice: Office, Remote, Hybrid). Q2: 'Please describe your home internet setup.' (Multiple lines text box, conditional on Q1 = Remote or Hybrid). Q3: 'Rate your satisfaction with provided tools' (Matrix question. Rows: Laptop, VPN Access, Headset. Columns: Dissatisfied, Neutral, Satisfied).
